     The Numbers Business Report

Game Night (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $69,179,066Details
International Box Office $48,500,000
Worldwide Box Office $117,679,066
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,475,793
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,813,217
Total $9,289,010
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Max and Annie, whose weekly couples game night gets kicked up a notch when Max’s charismatic brother, Brooks, arranges a murder mystery party, complete with fake thugs and faux federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it’s all part of the game—right? But as the six uber-competitive gamers set out to solve the case and win, they begin to discover that neither this game—nor Brooks —are what they seem to be. Over the course of one chaotic night, the friends find themselves increasingly in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn. With no rules, no points, and no idea who all the players are, this could turn out to be the most fun they've ever had… or game over.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,005,332 (24.6% of total gross)
Legs:4.07 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:58.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$37,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,488 opening theaters/3,502 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $90,821,250

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 23rd, 2018 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: February 23rd, 2018 (Wide) (Netherlands)
February 23rd, 2018 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
February 23rd, 2018 (Wide) (New Zealand)
February 23rd, 2018 (Wide) (Australia)
February 23rd, 2018 (Wide), released as Нощни игри (Bulgaria)
Video Release: May 4th, 2018 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for language, sexual references and some violence.
(Rating bulletin 2506 (Cert #51364), 12/13/2017)
Running Time: 93 minutes

Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Aggregate Films, Davis Entertainment, New Line Cinema, Access Entertainment, Dune Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Max and Annie, whose weekly couples game night gets kicked up a notch when Max’s charismatic brother, Brooks, arranges a murder mystery party, complete with fake thugs and faux federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it’s all part of the game—right? But as the six uber-competitive gamers set out to solve the case and win, they begin to discover that neither this game—nor Brooks —are what they seem to be. Over the course of one chaotic night, the friends find themselves increasingly in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn. With no rules, no points, and no idea who all the players are, this could turn out to be the most fun they've ever had… or game over.
